spam_call_warning: Warning: This call may be spam.
spam_sms_warning: Warning: This SMS may be spam.
otp_fraud_warning: You are receiving a bank OTP while on a call. This may be a scam. Do not share the code with anyone.
url_blocked: This website has been blocked for your protection.
fraud_alert: Suspicious activity detected on your account.
send_with_care_prompt: This transfer will be held for {duration}. You can cancel anytime.
diky_step1: We noticed an unusual transaction. Do you know the recipient {recipient}?
diky_step2: Please confirm: was this transfer of GHS {amount} authorised by you?
diky_step3: Final confirmation. Reply YES to send, NO to cancel.
ask_me_first_prompt: Did you authorise this transaction of GHS {amount}?
passive_protection_enrolled: Your line is protected against fraud. Reply STOP to opt out.
transaction_held: Your transaction is being reviewed for security.
block_confirmed: Number {msisdn} blocked. Reply UNBLOCK to reverse.
